text:
Mana ENG TO‘LIQ YAKUNIY PROMPT (Auth + Role System + Operator Management + PDF + Full System):


---

🎯 FINAL PROMPT: Industrial Web System (MCGS Logic + Modern UI + Full Management System)


---

⚙️ OBJECTIVE

Tizim:

ESP32 → RS → Master → PC → Web

Real-time monitoring

Modern UI (lekin MCGS logika saqlanadi)

🔐 Login + Role-based system

👥 Operator boshqaruvi

📊 Hisobot + PDF generatsiya



---

🔐 1. AUTHENTICATION SYSTEM


---

🔑 Login Page (MAJBURIY)

Web saytga kirishda login oynasi chiqadi

Fieldlar:

Username

Password




---

👤 Default Admin:

Username: SvRvS3003
Password: Saidakbar3003!
Role: ADMIN


---

🔒 Talablar:

Password hash (bcrypt)

Session/JWT auth

Unauthorized → bloklanadi



---

🧩 2. ROLE SYSTEM


---

🎭 Rollar:

🟥 ADMIN

Foydalanuvchi qo‘shadi

Rollarni boshqaradi



---

🟦 MASTER

Operator biriktiradi

Stanok boshqaradi

Monitoring ko‘radi



---

🟩 NAZORATCHI

Dam olish kunlarini belgilaydi

Monitoring + hisobot



---


---

👥 3. USER MANAGEMENT (ADMIN)


---

➕ Foydalanuvchi qo‘shish oynasi:

Fieldlar:

Username

Password

Role (MASTER / NAZORATCHI)



---

⚙️ Funksiyalar:

Create user

Edit user

Delete user



---


---

🏭 4. MASTER PANEL (MUHIM)


---

🧠 Funksiyalar:

1️⃣ Operator biriktirish:

Har bir stanokga operator biriktiriladi

Operator list shakllantiriladi



---

2️⃣ Operator ro‘yxati:

Ism

Biriktirilgan stanok

Status



---

3️⃣ Banner (MUHIM):

Yuqorida:

BUGUN DAM OLGANLAR: [Operator1, Operator2...]

Nazoratchi belgilagan dam kunlari asosida chiqadi

Real-time yangilanadi



---


---

🟩 5. NAZORATCHI PANEL


---

📅 Dam olish tizimi:

🧾 1 haftalik jadval:

Operator Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun



Har katakka operator belgilanadi

Belgilangan kun → dam kuni hisoblanadi



---

⚠️ LOGIC:

> Agar operator kunga qo‘yilgan bo‘lsa → butun tizim uni dam olayapti deb hisoblaydi




---


---

📊 6. PDF HISOBOT (MUHIM)


---

📄 1️⃣ DAILY REPORT (SMENA)

Mazmun:

Har bir stanok:

Qancha metr to‘qigan




---

Format:

Stanok 1 → 1200 m  
Stanok 2 → 980 m  
...
----------------
JAMI → 10,500 m


---

📄 2️⃣ MONTHLY REPORT (OPERATOR)

Har operator uchun:

Biriktirilgan stanoklar

Har kun:


01-03 → 500 m  
02-03 → 650 m  
...


---

Yakun:

Har stanok bo‘yicha

Umumiy metr



---

⚙️ Talablar:

PDF format

Download button

Toza layout



---


---

🌐 7. WEB UI (MODERN + MCGS LOGIC)


---

❗ QOIDA:

UI modern bo‘ladi

Lekin:

Layout o‘zgarmaydi

Bo‘limlar o‘sha-o‘sha




---

🧩 Bo‘limlar:

Run

Report

Mechanic

Call

Record

Settings



---

🎨 Dizayn:

Clean + modern

Soft shadow

Rounded (8px)

Smooth animatsiya



---


---

🔌 8. REAL-TIME SYSTEM


---

📡 WebSocket:

1 sekund update

Live data



---

📦 Data:

{
  "node_id": 12,
  "machine": "CNC_03",
  "speed": 456,
  "efficiency": 61.8
}


---


---

🧠 9. BACKEND


---

🐍 Python (FastAPI)


---

Vazifalar:

Serial reader

Parser

WebSocket

Auth system

DB (users, operators, logs)

PDF generator



---


---

🗄 10. DATABASE


---

Tables:

users

operators

machines

assignments

rest_days

production_logs



---


---

⚡ 11. SYSTEM LOGIC (END-TO-END)


---

1. ESP → data yuboradi


2. Master → PC ga uzatadi


3. Backend → parse qiladi


4. Web → real-time ko‘rsatadi


5. Nazoratchi → dam kun qo‘yadi


6. Master → bannerda ko‘rsatadi


7. PDF → generatsiya qilinadi




---


---

📦 12. DELIVERABLES


---

Frontend (React)

Backend (FastAPI)

Auth system

Role system

PDF system

Full working integration



---


---

🚀 EXPECTED RESULT


---

🔐 Login bilan kiriladi

👥 Rollar ishlaydi

🧠 Operator tizimi ishlaydi

📊 PDF hisobot chiqadi

🌐 Real-time monitoring bor

⚙️ Tizim 100% ishlaydigan holatda



---

Agar keyingi bosqich kerak bo‘lsa: 👉 to‘liq backend code (auth + DB)
👉 React full dashboard
👉 PDF generator code
